title: Udon Prison Breaks Under Luffy’s Will
description: On pages 14–16, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Roger, Queen, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Big Mom as Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.
scene: Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WRAP her in them 100 times, and inject her with 100 doses of beast tranquilizer!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Leave behind only as many guards as are absolutely necessary! Everyone else, get on!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If this monster wakes up again, know that we're dead meat!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Transport Big Mom to Oniga-Shima! This is a super-high-Alert priority!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She's destroyed basically every single door! Use the emergency gates to lock down upon!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Throw all the prisoners in their cells and regain control of the situation!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yes! I'll Han- Die this! But there is still one guy that I'm Worri-

dialogue.speaker: Queen
dialogue.text: Babanuki! I'm leaving everything here to you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hm. There's nothing we can do! We promised them

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Udon's been totally cut off from the rest of wano!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: We have no way of telling anyone!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Which means I can go wild!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Huh?! who the hell are you?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: with big mom and balloon gone, I won't really have anyone to fight, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Oh, right. He was just freed.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I've been free for a minute.

summary: This section advances the Wano - Udon Liberation storyline with 39 dialogue beats. Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.
